stemHtml: A trainee controller makes a transmission regarding the Runway Visual Range (RVR): "Romeo Victor Romeo six hundred". What error has the Controller made in this transmission?

options.a: RVR should be spoken as "Runway Visual Range" and the value as "six zero zero".
options.b: 600 should be spoken as "six zero zero".
options.c: RVR should be spoken as "Runway Visual Range".
